title: Reserved example domains
question: Which domains does the checked-in source identify as reserved for documentation?

proposals.canonicalText: IANA has reserved example.com, example.net, and example.org for use in documentation.
proposals.subject: IANA
proposals.predicate: has reserved for use in documentation
proposals.supportingQuote: The Internet Assigned Numbers Authority (IANA) has reserved example.com, example.net, and example.org for use in documentation.

proposals.canonicalText: IANA guarantees that the reserved example domains always support HTTPS.
proposals.subject: IANA
proposals.object: the reserved example domains always support HTTPS
proposals.supportingQuote: IANA guarantees that the reserved example domains always support HTTPS.
